title: FlexiDocs Handover
system_modules: API (Agency Banking, Branch APP and Mobile App)
management_procedure: Log onto Server 192.168.0.42 via Remote Desktop
dependency_management: Overdrafts Robots depend on Xampp-MySQL service
Service failure affects multiple business processes
Immediate restart required for service outages
migration_notice: System in process of migrating to MSSQL
Migration schedule to be communicated separately
troubleshooting: If portal inaccessible, check Xampp services
notes: Critical for account opening and KYC processes
Regular monitoring prevents business process interruptions
Coordinate with database team during migration
